title: poa orthoclada
intro: Poa orthoclada, also known as 'Orthoclada Grass', is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Poa orthoclada has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Poa orthoclada can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
